description_long: This is a vibrantly colored, single-serve milkshake cup with a tapered cylindrical shape and a wide, flat lid. The cup is predominantly red with bold, comic-style graphics and the word 'popsicle' prominently displayed in large, stylized letters, surrounded by stars and dynamic patterns. The lid is also decorated with matching graphics and text, and it slightly overhangs the rim of the cup. Nutritional information, branding, and product details are printed on the sides in white and orange text blocks. The cup appears to be made of plastic or coated paper, designed for single use, and is likely filled with a frozen or semi-frozen milkshake product. No straw or visible toppings are present, and the cup is sealed with a flat lid.
description: A colorful, branded milkshake cup with a flat lid, bold graphics, and no visible straw or toppings. The cup is tapered and covered in comic-style artwork.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'popsicle' branding, star graphics, and most of the decorative artwork.
description_view_1: Side view reveals more of the dynamic blue and red patterns, with partial text and barcode visible.
description_view_2: Back view displays nutritional information and product details in white and orange text blocks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights additional graphics and partial branding, with less text visible.
